description: AutoFlux marketing site + client proposal platform

features.title: Homepage — Complete
features.description: Full landing page with 8 sections: Hero, TrustBar, Stats, HowItWorks, WhoWeServe, Testimonial, CaseStudies, Contact

acceptance_criteria.description: All 8 sections render correctly
Responsive design (mobile + desktop)
PostHog analytics tracking on all CTAs and sections
Cal.com booking popup works
Header with mobile nav

features.title: Case Studies System
features.description: Data-driven case study pages at /cases/[slug] with SSG, media showcase, and CTA

acceptance_criteria.description: Dynamic routes with generateStaticParams
Case study data in data/case-studies.ts
Hero, Challenge, Solution, Results, Media, Takeaways, CTA sections
Category filtering on homepage cards
PostHog tracking on case study views

features.title: Client Proposals
features.description: Individual proposal pages with interactive demos for each prospective client

acceptance_criteria.description: eToll proposal + demo
CheckPoint proposal + demo
Moppity proposal + demo
GlobalHair proposal + demo
Deck Builder proposal + demo
Alamance Property proposal + demo
Orgonic Art (Raphael) proposal + demo
Image Resize proposal + demo
Theo proposal
Global Bridge demo

features.title: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Password-protected page at /admin listing all proposals with links to view proposal and demo

acceptance_criteria.description: Password login with localStorage persistence
Lists proposals with client name, price, status
Links to proposal and demo pages

features.title: Analytics & Tracking
features.description: PostHog integration with comprehensive event tracking

acceptance_criteria.description: Pageview tracking
CTA click tracking
Section visibility tracking (IntersectionObserver)
Case study view/click tracking
Carousel navigation tracking
Cal.com booking funnel tracking
Video play tracking

features.title: Case Study Videos & Media
features.description: Add real video content and images to case study pages. Currently using placeholder states.

acceptance_criteria.description: Video content for TikTok Slideshow case study
Video content for other case studies
Before/after image comparisons where applicable

features.title: SEO & Meta Tags
features.description: Add Open Graph tags, Twitter cards, structured data, and sitemap for better discoverability

acceptance_criteria.description: OG image and meta tags on all pages
Twitter card tags
JSON-LD structured data for case studies
Sitemap.xml generation
robots.txt

features.title: Performance Optimization
features.description: Image optimization, lazy loading, Core Web Vitals improvements

acceptance_criteria.description: Use next/image for all images
Lazy load below-fold sections
Lighthouse score > 90 on all metrics

features.title: Admin Dashboard — Sync with Actual Proposals
features.description: Admin page currently lists only 3 proposals hardcoded. Should list all 10+ proposals.

acceptance_criteria.description: All proposal routes reflected in admin dashboard
Proposal data sourced from a shared config, not hardcoded

features.title: SmartFlip Demo — Deal Finder Fixes
features.description: Justin's feedback: deal finder needs search bar, budget filter visibility, source links, location picker

acceptance_criteria.description: Search bar for specific item/category search
Budget filter more prominent (currently in code but not visible enough)
Clickable source links on deals (link to actual eBay/Amazon/Facebook listing)
Location picker/setting so app knows what local means
Trending deals on dashboard clickable to expand with full details

features.title: SmartFlip Demo — Subscription Split Fix
features.description: Justin confirmed: 40% of subscriptions go to profit pool, 20% direct referral commission, 40% company. Current demo says subscriptions never go to pool — WRONG.

acceptance_criteria.description: Update profit pool funding: 40% subscriptions + affiliate + marketplace fees
Update proposal page Profit Pool section with correct 40/20/40 split
Update demo earnings tab to reflect correct split
Remove all 'never from subscriptions' language

features.title: SmartFlip Demo — Earnings Page Rebuild
features.description: Rebuild earnings tab to match Justin's screenshot layout: Base Pool / Growth Pool split, monthly cap progress, revenue sources bar chart, referral tracking, earnings history

acceptance_criteria.description: Top row: Total Revenue, Base Pool, Growth Pool
Estimated Monthly Payout: Base Pool Share + Growth Pool Share + Est. Next Payout + Total Earned
Monthly Cap Progress: $10K cap with progress bar and % label
Platform Revenue Sources: bar chart showing Marketplace, Subscription, Affiliate amounts
How the Profit Pool Works: 3-step explanation (revenue collected, 40% to pool, monthly payouts)
20% referral commission section: total referrals, names, earnings per referral
Earnings History: monthly rows with date, amount, paid/pending status

features.title: SmartFlip Demo — Marketplace Updates
features.description: Update marketplace to reflect free quick-sell concept with resale value data and better language

acceptance_criteria.description: Update marketplace description: 'built-in marketplace to find flipping deals from people selling for quick cash'
Each listing shows resale value with data source link
AI price suggestions: lower price = faster sale, show resale margin for flippers
Local only vs ships filter visible
Seller ratings and report/dispute button on listings

features.title: SmartFlip Demo — Visual Polish
features.description: Replace emoji placeholders with real product images, improve visual quality

acceptance_criteria.description: Replace emojis with stock product images or better placeholders
List Item button shows demo tooltip or disabled state instead of doing nothing
What makes trending explanation/indicator on dashboard

features.title: SmartFlip Proposal Page Updates
features.description: Update proposal page language and profit pool section per Justin's feedback

acceptance_criteria.description: Marketplace language: 'built-in marketplace to find flipping deals from people selling for quick cash'
Profit Pool section: update to 40% pool, 20% referral, 40% company split
Add clear V1 vs V2 features comparison table (scannable)
